items.final_wording: Requires full assessment of presenting mental-health problems and exclusion of physical causes before stress-specific management.

source.title: Guidelines for the management of conditions specifically related to stress
source.population: Children, adolescents, and adults with symptoms and disorders specifically related to traumatic stress, bereavement, or acute stress.
source.exclusions: Exact only for trauma-related stress conditions and physical-cause exclusion; not exact for generic work stress, burnout, or every adjustment presentation, and UAE pathways require clinician review.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Requires full assessment of presenting mental-health problems and exclusion of physical causes before stress-specific management.

items.rationale: Supports assessment before stress-specific recommendations for stress reaction follow-up; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Defines acute traumatic stress through intrusion, avoidance, hyperarousal, and significant functional impairment after a potentially traumatic event and supports clinician-led psychological-first-aid or trauma-focused care documentation without medication invention.

source.title: Guidelines for the management of conditions specifically related to stress
source.population: Children, adolescents, and adults with symptoms and disorders specifically related to traumatic stress, bereavement, or acute stress.
source.exclusions: Exact only for trauma-related stress conditions and physical-cause exclusion; not exact for generic work stress, burnout, or every adjustment presentation, and UAE pathways require clinician review.

exact_location.heading: Acute traumatic stress symptoms in the first month after a potentially traumatic event

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines acute traumatic stress through intrusion, avoidance, hyperarousal, and significant functional impairment after a potentially traumatic event and supports clinician-led psychological-first-aid or trauma-focused care documentation without medication invention.

items.rationale: Supports review of acute traumatic-stress symptoms within the first month for stress reaction follow-up; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Describes depressed mood in response to an identifiable psychosocial stressor and supports documenting single, multiple, recurrent, or continuing social and occupational stressors.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Depression
source.population: Adults presenting with suspected or established depressive symptoms; emergency, severe, psychotic, bipolar, or safeguarding presentations require escalation.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth depression documentation and risk screening; treatment, diagnosis, and local emergency pathways remain clinician-led.

exact_location.heading: Differential diagnosis — adjustment disorder with depressed mood

source.evidence_paraphrase: Describes depressed mood in response to an identifiable psychosocial stressor and supports documenting single, multiple, recurrent, or continuing social and occupational stressors.

items.rationale: Supports clinician-entered stressor and adjustment-disorder differential context for stress reaction follow-up; no decision is generated.
